name: mcp-workspace
description: Leadbay packages monorepo — @leadbay/core shared tools, @leadbay/mcp MCP server

scripts.build: pnpm components:build && pnpm prompts:build && pnpm -r build
scripts.test: pnpm components:check && pnpm prompts:check && pnpm -r test
scripts.test:eval: EVAL=1 pnpm --filter @leadbay/mcp exec vitest run --config vitest.eval.config.ts
scripts.test:gate: EVAL=1 EVAL_TIER=gate pnpm --filter @leadbay/mcp exec vitest run --config vitest.eval.config.ts
scripts.test:periodic: EVAL=1 EVAL_TIER=periodic pnpm --filter @leadbay/mcp exec vitest run --config vitest.eval.config.ts
